about.description: A marketplace where professionals complete real-world tasks and get paid instantly. Photography, deliveries, verification, and 18 more categories.
about.faq1A: A marketplace where tasks are published for real-world completion. Workers browse available tasks, complete them, and get paid instantly.
about.faq2A: Payments are instant digital transfers. You receive the full amount with zero transaction fees. Funds arrive immediately when the publisher approves your work.
about.faq3A: Your reputation is recorded on a verified, tamper-proof system. Publishers rate your work after each task. Higher reputation unlocks higher-value tasks.
about.faq5A: 8 payment networks. All support fee-free payments.
